flavor: Give to the Night Thrasher player.
name: Practice
text:
You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose:
• Exhaust your identity or discard 1 card from your hand → remove Practice from the game.
• You cannot flip the Battle Board upgrade until the start of the next villain phase. Discard this obligation.

flavor: I am Terrax the Tamer. And you are tamed.
name: Terrax The Tamer
text: Forced Response: After Terrax the Tamer activates, discard the top 8 cards of the encounter deck. If the Cosmic Ax attachment was discarded this way, reveal it.

name: Cemented
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Players cannot make basic attacks with heroes or allies or flip upgrades or identities. Action: Each player may discard 1 card from their hand → until the end of the phase, each player who discarded a card this way may treat this card's printed text box as if it were blank.

flavor: "The Ax is part of me. I need not hold it to command it. Your weapon is inferior." —Terrax the Tamer
name: Cosmic Connection
text: When Revealed: If the Cosmic Ax attachment is in play and your hero has a [[Weapon]] card in play, take 3 indirect damage. If no damage was taken this way, this card gains surge.

name: Cosmic Ax
text:
Attach to Terrax the Tamer. If you cannot, discard the top 8 cards of the encounter deck. If Terrax the Tamer was discarded this way, reveal him and attach Cosmic Ax to him.
[star] Boost: If Terrax the Tamer is in play, reveal this card.
